profile.name: Sarfaraz
profile.bio: Full Stack Developer building scalable web applications with Laravel and Next.js.

about: I specialize in clean architecture and performant web solutions. Focused on Laravel, Next.js, and delivering high-quality user experiences.

experience.description: Architecting full-stack solutions with a focus on modularity. Currently reducing development overhead by implementing a shared component library across Laravel and React projects for high-performance enterprise applications.

Led the ground-up development of a multi-vendor marketplace. Engineered a robust PostgreSQL schema that handled complex product variations without performance degradation and streamlined deployment using optimized Docker configurations.

Designed and launched the official club website as a central hub for event details and resources. Developed internal automation tools to manage event registrations, significantly reducing manual data entry for the core team.

education.school: Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology

projects.title: Audiophile - Modern E-commerce
projects.description: Demonstrating how Next.js 15 Server Actions can create a lightning-fast, zero-friction shopping experience with absolute type-safety and persistent global state.

projects.title: Frontend Mentor Challenges
projects.description: A curated collection of 30+ responsive and accessible web solutions, focusing on translating complex design systems into production-ready frontend code.

projects.title: AI-Powered Chatbot
projects.description: Exploring LLM integration by building a seamless chat interface using Gemini API, Laravel, and Inertia.js with a focus on real-time feedback loops.

projects.title: 50 Projects In JS
projects.description: 50 Mini Web Projects using Vanilla HTML, CSS & JavaScript to understand core fundamentals through hands-on experimentation.

projects.title: Nuskha - Recipe App
projects.description: Recipe web app using the Forkify API to search, view, modify, and bookmark recipes with a focus on API integration and state management.

projects.title: Invento - Inventory CMS
projects.description: Full Stack Inventory Management System with real-time tracking and reporting, built to demonstrate CRUD operations and database management in Next.js.
